_comment: Tier-2 for NGSolve maxwell#0: full HCurl (without nograds=True) has the gradient kernel as null space; the curl-curl matrix is singular and BilinearForm.mat.Inverse raises NgException 'UmfpackInverse: Numeric factorization failed. UMFPACK: WARNING: matrix is singular'. nograds=True or a 1e-8*u*v*dx regularisation removes the kernel and the inverse succeeds. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
